request.parser_error: Unterminated string in JSON at position 39 (line 2 column 38)

finding: The initial cap was a runner calibration error, not candidate-quality evidence. Gemini low reasoning consumed nearly the entire completion allowance before its truncated 39-character JSON content.

decision.rationale: The 222-word maximum target plus hidden low-reasoning use requires materially more headroom. The replacement matches the already exercised local target screen and remains budget-bounded.

claim_limit: This single paid calibration request establishes only that the original completion cap was too small for this routed reasoning configuration.
